qa_gate_decision.reason: RCA-006 Protocol violations: 35 deferred items without user approval markers
minimum_actions_to_unblock: Add user approval marker + deferral reason + timestamp to each of 35 items

immediate: User decision: Choose Option A, B, or C within 30 minutes
RCA-006 compliance: Add approval markers if deferring
Test failures: Document why 2 tests fail if deferring
medium_term: If Option A: Complete all work within 4-6 hours
If Option B: Document deferrals within 1-2 hours, move to QA approval
If Option C: Fix tests and split story within 5-7 hours

validator_notes: Story demonstrates good implementation (53/55 tests passing, 581-line module, complete algorithm) but violates RCA-006 by not properly documenting or justifying the 35 deferred DoD items. All deferred work is feasible to complete immediately. No legitimate blockers identified. QA approval is blocked until deferrals are either completed or properly documented with user approval markers.
